name: Joy (“Flash of Miracle”)
description: Joy is a Leonin (feline humanoid) hero from Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, originally known as the most infamous petty thief prowling the streets of Lumina City . Growing up an orphan in the slums, she survived by her wits and had longed for nothing more than a full belly and a warm heart. In a fortunate turn of events, the Leonin mage Harith eventually brought Joy back to her ancestral homeland in the Gleaming Marsh , where the unconditional love of her kin finally healed her wandering, guarded heart . No longer afraid of losing those she cares about, Joy embraced her identity as the prophesied “Child of Miracle” and vowed to protect her people, blazing forward as the lightning-fast “Flash of Miracle” . On the battlefield, Joy is an agile Assassin who uses electrifying speed and rhythmic magic to chase down foes and dance circles around them.
creator: Dovelimenya
